spec.name: parallel_note_readers
spec.description: Spawn 6 parallel sub-agents, each reading one note file (note_0.txt through note_5.txt) and returning its unguessable fact. A coordinator then merges all 6 facts into summary.txt.
spec.task_template: Read the file <REPO>/cgb_results/v0941_deepseek_v4_pro_work/subagent-04-request-only__pull__deepseek_v4_pro__t0/workspace/note_{i}.txt and return its exact contents as a single fact string.
spec.coordinator_task: Collect all 6 facts from the parallel sub-agents and write them as a numbered list into <REPO>/cgb_results/v0941_deepseek_v4_pro_work/subagent-04-request-only__pull__deepseek_v4_pro__t0/workspace/summary.txt.

request.rationale: The objective explicitly states the breadth of 6 independent note files exceeds what I can process alone within my iteration budget (6 remaining). The CORRECT move is to delegate to parallel helper agents via the harness. Each sub-agent reads one note file in parallel, then a coordinator merges all facts into summary.txt.

subagent.task: The objective explicitly states the breadth of 6 independent note files exceeds what I can process alone within my iteration budget (6 remaining). The CORRECT move is to delegate to parallel helper agents via the harness. Each sub-agent reads one note file in parallel, then a coordinator merges all facts into summary.txt.
